reviews.text: Very disappointing experience. The dietician I visited was completely uninterested/unengaged during my visit (e.g. she asked me to describe my diet, which I did, and then mentioned I am pescatarian, after being told I eat meat every week//she was legit cleaning her nails whilst talking to me? not even looking at me in the face). She then took 5 days to send me a diet which seems straight out of the '80s (granola for breakfast?). Would not recommend at all!!!

I spent £450 at this clinic and sadly it was a huge disappointment. I paid £300 for the first visit, got a treatment that didn’t work, and when I was desperate enough to go back, they charged me another £150 for a second visit. That treatment failed too.

Only when I saw other doctors did I finally get the correct diagnosis and correct treatment.

I can accept paying for the first visit, even though it was very expensive.
But asking patients to pay again when the first treatment didn’t help feels unfair and wrong

I wouldn’t recommend this clinic to my worst enemy. As soon as I opened the door and entered, I found myself in front of two of the most annoyed, arrogant and not welcoming receptionists I had ever seen in my life. There was another …

Quite frankly very bad experience. I am Italian and I started going to this clinic because it was an Italian clinic, however I will not go back anymore. They gave me twice in a row the wrong prescription even though I called and send emails …

I had my first visit in Dottor. London, Holborn, few weeks ago with gynaecology Dr. Ferrara.
In the report of my visit, there was some of fake information, especially …

Walked in yesterday (26/01/2023 at 6:30pm) to book an appointment with a doctor after my coworker suggested this clinic to me. My colleague told me I would get assigned to a doctor based on my symptoms. When I arrived the receptionist was …

Had a visit with a doctor for mental health issues,
After the visit that cost 250£ pounds,
I tried to contact the doctor via mail for guidance and suggestion, …

Awful

I had an appointment with a dermatologist and I was very disappointed.

The appointment was rushed and the doctor didn’t seem professional at all.
I was expecting a more thorough assessment considering the amount of money I spent. I would not recommend this clinic to anyone.
Never again!!! My experience was awful! I had a visit with Dr Sereni, she wasn’t professional at all and the diagnosis after the shortest visit in my life was completely wrong!!!
Dietist with broken scale. Do not recommend it at all!!

Unfortunately, my experience with this clinic was disappointing. I paid £80 for a bioimpedance test, expecting a comprehensive body composition analysis, but I wasn't informed in advance that key parameters such as resistance (R) and …

An experience I wouldn't wish on anyone. I spent a lot of money on blood tests in the gynecology department, which the NHS didn't do. After a month of waiting and multiple calls, I went to discuss it. They were supposed to call me back, but …

I visited this practice for a urological consultation in December 2019. The doctor, who was extremely kind and professional at first glance, prescribed two weeks of antibiotics, promising to "get back in touch" (to avoid paying for a …

Very low-quality Italian clinic, lacking professionalism. I was examined by the doctor without a lab coat, dressed very casually.
Aside from that, I noticed little customer service attention, as I had to ask …

Horrible experience
I went to a dermatologist to remove some warts. He created wounds that were too deep, taking away some of my capillaries, and even today, two days later, the …

Terrible service.
I booked a self-administered COVID antibody test. Eight days after payment, the shipment had still not been made. I was told to wait 10 business days. Two days later, I was told they no longer offer this type of test and would refund my money or schedule a new test to be taken in the office.

I paid for the gynecological examination (160 pounds), but this one was literally nonexistent, had I known about it, I would have avoided it and only paid the 180 pounds for the ultrasound.
No external palpation, even for my breasts, where I was told if I wanted to go to Italy for a checkup.
An NHS-style clinic with prices that are even excessive for a private practice.

Horrible
I had booked a mole mapping and acne consultation. I went in, and the doctor seemed a little nervous. He asked me which moles he wanted to see. I started pointing out a few, but he only looked at them very briefly with the device, barely getting close. The whole thing lasted two minutes, exaggerating. A small angioma on my head told me not to comb my hair. Then he handed me some flyers with sunscreen, telling me I had to wear it as if it were 30 degrees Celsius in London and the sea! Having also booked an acne consultation, I asked him about my skin, and he told me everything was fine and that maybe later on I could just get rid of the marks with laser. I should point out that my skin isn't damaged or eaten away by acne! Of course, he pulled out another flyer, telling me to choose one of the creams listed there! I already knew that Roche-Posay was good for my face, since I often go to the dermatologist in Italy, so I know how a skin mapping and checkup are performed... but I think combining an anti-wrinkle cream with an acne cream is different! The icing on the cake was that the girl wanted to charge me for the mole mapping and for the dermatological consultation that didn't happen and ended up with a flyer!
I really don't recommend this dermatologist, I don't know about other doctors.

Horrible experience, to say the least, I'm sorry.
I made an urgent appointment at their office because I'm prone to an infection and wanted to see them, but they changed the date THREE TIMES. I added and spoke …

Worst money I've ever spent. I have a foot problem, and I don't want £250 to make me bounce on my toes and tell me I need physiotherapy without any further explanation, just lightly touching my heel. So arrogant!!!! Never again!
I went to avoid the GP only to be told to go to the GP. It's absolutely not worth the money they're asking.
They have crazy prices for what they offer! Not a good experience at all! Avoid
After today I will never set foot in there again.
Hi Jose, we don't have your records on our system. Have you ever been to our clinic? Thank you

I have been to this Clinic previously to see a Dermatologist and it went really well even though I have noticed the clinic doesn't look well kept (my GP practice is much cleaner)

I went a second time to see another kind of doctor and I was very disappointed, she saw me and did an ultrasound scan but she did not talk about the outcomes at all, and when I asked questions she looked very annoyed. Moreover she wrote the details for my GP to see (details that were not discussed with me at all, so I left even more confused tham before) and then they forgot to send it to my GP, apparently they did not have their contacts but still the logical thing to do after charging me £400 would be to contact me to get the contact to make sure everything was sent. I have chased them to ask if the outcomes sent to my GP were complete and I had no answer. Once they take the payment they don't care anymore. To be honest, if you cannot go to get checked in Italy, you would be better off with the NHS.

I would also like to add that the consultation room of this particular doctor looked very unhygenic and not up to standard for a clinic (public or private).

I would not reccomend even if some of the doctors might be good.

Really poor service with Dott. Castiglione. After the first appointment, he disappeared. Never replied my emails. I went to a different Urologist who helped me with my prostatite and told me the diagnose prescribed by Dott. Castiglione was completely wrong and just a temporary solution for my pain. Seems he was just after the money.
Unreasonably overpriced.
Poor service

I recently went for a very urgent gynecological appointment.
Unfortunately, I was initially given a diagnosis that turned out to be incorrect after I told the doctor I'd self-diagnosed in complete ignorance!!! In the end, my diagnosis was correct, and I paid a whopping £150 for nothing...

It is very difficult to get in touch with your doctor if you need urgent assistance or advice. Appointments are very expensive, however, once you leave the clinic you feel that you are no longer their patient, unless you book another visit and pay the full cost again.

Dear Arianna, we are very sorry that you are not happy with the consultations you had with us. Your last appointment was just before summer. In order to assess your feedback and respect your privacy, could you please write a formal email to info@dottorelondon.com Thank you!
